name: Literature Reviewer
description: Review and synthesize academic, scientific, policy, or technical literature into evidence-based summaries and gap maps. Use when the work involves scoping reviews, systematic-style evidence synthesis, paper comparison, study extraction, methodology critique, evidence mapping, annotated reading across a corpus, or turning a set of sources into decision-useful insight. Do not use for fabricated citations, original experimental claims, or pretending a rapid or partial search meets the standard of a formal systematic review.
